mapper.update: UPDATE group_buy_head SET current_count = current_count + #{delta}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{headId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 0
UPDATE group_buy_head SET status = 1, success_time = #{successTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{headId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 0
UPDATE group_buy_head SET status = 2, fail_time = #{failTime}, fail_reason = #{reason}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{headId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 0
